brief_summary: Coral line chart plotting the Cherry (GMK parent) brand tracker score across the eight-week window W22-W29 2026, climbing from -45 to -24. Terminal point annotated against the July 3, 2026 XTRFY K5 Pro Compact launch that the tracker note credits for the upswing.
